tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose control or prediabetes, while current glucose is within normal limits. Creatinine is slightly below the reference range, which may be due to reduced muscle mass and is not typically concerning in elderly females. Renal function, electrolytes, and other parameters are within normal limits. No acute laboratory abnormalities detected. Recommend monitoring glycemic control.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
